descriptions: Pagans are affiliated with the Barbarians, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: The Pagan's have chapters in Charleston and Fairmont , and are affiliated with the Barbarians, a local motorcycle gang.

descriptions: The infobox lists Wołomin mafia as a rival of Pruszków mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Wołomin mafia

Coffin Cheaters.description: International outlaw motorcycle club formed in Perth, Australia in 1970. Expanded internationally by patching over Norwegian gangs in 2004-2005. Involved in violent conflict with the Mongrel Mob in the 1980s. Currently active in Australia, Norway, and Germany.

descriptions: Club Deroes and Coffin Cheaters cooperated to eject the Mongrel Mob.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1989 these four gangs combined forces to violently eject the New Zealand-based street gang, the Mongrel Mob which was attempting to establish itself in Perth.

descriptions: City Crew MC is a feeder club for the US Coffin Cheaters MC.
edges.evidence_quote: City Crew Mc is a feeder club.

descriptions: The Coffin Cheaters and Club Deroes were in a bikie war in 1998.
edges.evidence_quote: Marc Chabriere, who was a Coffin Cheaters member murdered during the 1998 bikie war between the Coffin Cheaters and the Club Deroes.

descriptions: Coffin Cheaters absorbed Forbidden Few MC through patching over in 2004.
edges.evidence_quote: later 'patched over' two Norwegian gangs, Forbidden Few MC and Wizard MC, in 2004 and 2005 respectively.

descriptions: Coffin Cheaters, along with three other clubs, cooperated to eject the Mongrel Mob from Perth.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1989 these four gangs combined forces to violently eject the New Zealand-based street gang, the Mongrel Mob which was attempting to establish itself in Perth.

descriptions: Coffin Cheaters absorbed Wizard MC through patching over in 2005.
edges.evidence_quote: later 'patched over' two Norwegian gangs, Forbidden Few MC and Wizard MC, in 2004 and 2005 respectively.

descriptions: The formation of the Finks Perth chapter caused friction with the Coffin Cheaters.
edges.evidence_quote: The commencement of the Perth chapter caused friction between the Finks and the Coffin Cheaters Perth.

descriptions: Gods Garbage and Coffin Cheaters cooperated to eject the Mongrel Mob.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1989 these four gangs combined forces to violently eject the New Zealand-based street gang, the Mongrel Mob which was attempting to establish itself in Perth.

descriptions: Gypsy Jokers and Coffin Cheaters cooperated to eject the Mongrel Mob.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1989 these four gangs combined forces to violently eject the New Zealand-based street gang, the Mongrel Mob which was attempting to establish itself in Perth.

descriptions: Hells Angels are allied with Coffin Cheaters in Norway.
edges.evidence_quote: the Hells Angels allied with the Coffin Cheaters on the other

descriptions: Hells Angels aligned with Coffin Cheaters.
edges.evidence_quote: The Australian Hells Angels have aligned themselves with the Coffin Cheaters

Pruszków mafia.description: The Pruszków mafia was a Polish criminal organization originating from Pruszków in the 1990s, active in the Warsaw area. It engaged in car theft, drug trafficking, kidnapping, extortion, weapon trafficking, and murder. Law enforcement dealt a severe blow in 2000 after a key member became a crown witness, and the group has not been significantly active since.

descriptions: The Mokotów group splintered from the Pruszków mafia in 2000.
edges.evidence_quote: In the same year, a group originating from the Pruszków mafia, known as the Mokotów group, splintered off and continued to act independently until 2014.

descriptions: The infobox lists Wołomin mafia as a rival of Pruszków mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Wołomin mafia

descriptions: The Fob-killers are listed as a rival of the Red Scorpions in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Fob-killers (Alberta)

descriptions: The United Nations lists the Fob-killers as allies.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Fob-killers of Alberta

descriptions: George Street lists Pregnant Alley as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: List Majestic Alley , Taylor's Alley , Southside , Pregnant Alley , Brick City , Ghost Town

edges.target: High Council of the Islamic Emirate
descriptions: The Taliban killed Mullah Abdul Manan Niazi after he formed the rebellious High Council of the Islamic Emirate.
edges.evidence_quote: Mullah Abdul Manan Niazi, the Taliban commander of the attack and the new governor of Mazar, who the Taliban later killed after forming the rebellious High Council of the Islamic Emirate

descriptions: Watts Varrio Grape Street 13 is listed as a rival of Florencia 13 in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: 18th Street gang , 38th Street gang , Grape Street Watts Crips , Watts Varrio Grape Street 13 , Hat Gang Watts Crips , Huntington Park Locos , Playboys , East Side 13 , South Los 13

descriptions: Rowdy Ones is a puppet club of Hells Angels in Sorel.
edges.evidence_quote: Every Quebec region had its own puppet club: the Rockers Motor Club in Montreal, the Rowdy Ones in Sorel, the Evil Ones in Drummondville, the Satan's Guard in the Saguenay region, and the Jokers in St-Jean

descriptions: Strays MC became the West Wales Outlaws chapter.
edges.evidence_quote: The West Wales chapter originated in as the Strays MC in 1979.

descriptions: Ahrar-ul-Hind splintered from TTP in 2014.
edges.evidence_quote: a group of TTP terrorists under the lead of Maulana Umar Qasmi broke away from the organization to form the Ahrar-ul-Hind

descriptions: Abu Sayyaf claimed that Daulat Ul-Islamiya, an allied group, was responsible for the Davao City bombing.
edges.evidence_quote: Abu Sayyaf spokesperson Abu Rami was reported to claim responsibility. He later denied the report and any involvement, saying a group allied to them; the Daulat Ul-Islamiya were responsible.

descriptions: Aggi Crew demanded tax from Yardie gangs, leading to a turf war with shootings.
edges.evidence_quote: The yardies did not agree with this however and stormed a cafe run by the Aggis, which doubled as a front for an illegal gambling operation. Thus was started a small-scale turf war which included a number of shootings

Toa-kai.description: The Toa-kai is a yakuza syndicate based in Tokyo, Japan, founded in 1948 by Zainichi Korean mob boss Hisayuki Machii as the Tosei-kai. Originally a far-right anti-communist organization, it became one of Tokyo's most powerful gangs during post-war economic growth. The group is a member of the Kanto Hatsuka-kai federation and has aligned with the Yamaguchi-gumi. As of the infobox, it has an estimated 20 members.

descriptions: Matsuba-kai and Toa-kai are fellow members of the Kantō Hatsuka-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: The Matsuba-kai is a member of a yakuza fraternal federation named the Kantō Hatsuka-kai, along with four other Kantō -based yakuza syndicates, the Sumiyoshi-kai , the Inagawa-kai , the Toa-kai , and the Soai-kai .

descriptions: Dojin-kai attacked Toa-kai after Toa-kai refused to cooperate in drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: the Dojin-kai attempted to compel the Toa-kai to co-operate in drug trafficking but the Toa-kai rejected it and then the mass attacks started

descriptions: Dojin-kai attempted expansion into Okinawa with heavy violence, contrasting with Toa-kai's gentle stance.
edges.evidence_quote: The reason why the Toa-kai has been able to be active on the island may be because the group has historically been more oriented to legitimate businesses, and of its gentle stance, in contrast to other yakuza syndicates which have attempted to expand their influences into Okinawa with heavy violence, such as the Yamaguchi-gumi and especially the Dojin-kai .

descriptions: Toa-kai and Inagawa-kai are fellow members of the Kanto Hatsuka-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: The Toa-kai is a member of a bakuto fraternal federation named the Kanto Hatsuka-kai, along with four other Kanto -based yakuza syndicates, the Sumiyoshi-kai , the Inagawa-kai , the Matsuba-kai , and the Soai-kai .

descriptions: Kyokuryu-kai attacks and expels yakuza syndicates entering Okinawa, including Toa-kai.
edges.evidence_quote: Okinawa's underworld has been known for its exclusiveness since the 20th century, where the dominating Kyokuryu-kai has persistently attacked and violently expelled any yakuza syndicate attempting to enter the island.

descriptions: Makoto-kai was an affiliate of Tosei-kai (predecessor of Toa-kai) in Okinawa.
edges.evidence_quote: Gibo met with Machii through Kodama, founding an affiliate of the Tosei-kai in Okinawa.

descriptions: Toa-kai and Matsuba-kai are fellow members of the Kanto Hatsuka-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: The Toa-kai is a member of a bakuto fraternal federation named the Kanto Hatsuka-kai, along with four other Kanto -based yakuza syndicates, the Sumiyoshi-kai , the Inagawa-kai , the Matsuba-kai , and the Soai-kai .

descriptions: Toa-kai and Soai-kai are fellow members of the Kanto Hatsuka-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: The Toa-kai is a member of a bakuto fraternal federation named the Kanto Hatsuka-kai, along with four other Kanto -based yakuza syndicates, the Sumiyoshi-kai , the Inagawa-kai , the Matsuba-kai , and the Soai-kai .

descriptions: Toa-kai and Sumiyoshi-kai are fellow members of the Kanto Hatsuka-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: The Toa-kai is a member of a bakuto fraternal federation named the Kanto Hatsuka-kai, along with four other Kanto -based yakuza syndicates, the Sumiyoshi-kai , the Inagawa-kai , the Matsuba-kai , and the Soai-kai .

descriptions: Toa-kai has aligned with and been supported by Yamaguchi-gumi since the Taoka era and since 2005.
time_periods: since the Taoka era in the 20th century; since 2005
edges.evidence_quote: The Toa-kai has aligned itself with the largest known Yamaguchi-gumi syndicate since the syndicate's Taoka era in the 20th century, and has been closely supported by Shinobu Tsukasa , the sixth-generation godfather of the Yamaguchi-gumi, since 2005 when the sixth era of the Yamaguchi-gumi officially started.

descriptions: Tosei-kai and Yamaguchi-gumi made a deal allowing Yamaguchi-gumi to operate in Tokyo.
edges.evidence_quote: even the Yamaguchi-gumi 's Taoka had to cut a deal with Machii to allow that group to operate in Tokyo.

descriptions: Yoshimi-kogyo is a branch organization of Toa-kai.
edges.evidence_quote: The Toa-kai's notable branch organizations include the Yoshimi-kogyo ( 誼興業 ) .

descriptions: Toa-kai is an ally of Yamaguchi-gumi.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Inagawa-kai, Soai-kai, Matsuba-kai, Kyōsei-kai, Aizukotetsu-kai, Toa-kai, Fukuhaku-kai, Gōda-ikka, Shinwa-kai

Mamak Gang.description: The Mamak Gang is a notorious Malaysian gang active since the early 1990s, specializing in carjacking and robberies. They are most infamous for stealing RM 12 million worth of gold bars from the Malaysia Airlines cargo complex in 1994. Despite multiple arrests and preventive detention, they continued operations from prison until their last three members were arrested in December 2006.

Friends Stand United.description: Anti-fascist, anti-racist, and anti-drug hardcore crew founded in the late 1980s by Elgin James in Boston, Massachusetts. Originally fought Neo-Nazis and racist groups in the punk scene, but later accused of unprovoked violence and intimidation. Classified by the FBI as a street gang.

descriptions: PEN1 members established a chapter of FSU.
edges.evidence_quote: Members of PEN1 also established a regional chapter of the straight edge street gang FSU (Fuck Shit Ups) in Huntington Beach as well.

Hellbanianz.description: Hellbanianz is an organised street gang based in the Gascoigne Estate in Barking, London. It is involved in drug trafficking and armed robbery, with ties to the Albanian mafia. The gang gained notoriety for flaunting wealth and firearms on social media, and has been linked to several high-profile criminal cases. Its most prominent member, Tristen Asllani, was sentenced to 25 years in prison in 2016.

descriptions: Hellbanianz is a rival of the A-team.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Kinahan Cartel , A-team , Huyton Firm

descriptions: Hellbanianz is a rival of the Huyton Firm.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Kinahan Cartel , A-team , Huyton Firm

descriptions: Hellbanianz is a rival of the Kinahan Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Kinahan Cartel , A-team , Huyton Firm

Greco Mafia clan.description: Historically one of the most influential Mafia clans in Sicily, based in Ciaculli and Croceverde Giardini near Palermo. Founded in the late 19th century, the extended family played a key role in the Sicilian Cosa Nostra, with members serving as secretaries of the Sicilian Mafia Commission. Involved in citrus growing, cigarette smuggling, heroin trafficking, and money laundering. Declined in the 2000s but remains active with strong influence.

descriptions: Greco is listed as an allied 'ndrina in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: 'Ndrine alleate - Greco con a capo Angelo Greco (1965)

descriptions: The Greco clan was part of the Corleonesi coalition.
edges.evidence_quote: Michele Greco from the Greco Mafia clan

descriptions: Galatolo clan fought Greco clan over control of wholesale market racket.
edges.evidence_quote: The Acquasanta Mafia clan tried to muscle in on the protection racket that traditionally belonged the 'Mafia of the Gardens' — such as the Greco, Bontade and Sorci clans from the southeast of Palermo

descriptions: Greco cousins participated in a meeting with American Cosa Nostra members in 1957, likely discussing heroin trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: They both participated at the Grand Hotel des Palmes Mafia meeting in October 1957 between prominent American and Sicilian mafiosi.

descriptions: Greco and Bontade clans were allies supporting Riccobono.
edges.evidence_quote: Riccobono had been appointed with the strong support of Salvatore Greco and Stefano Bontade

descriptions: The Grecos had an uneasy alliance with the Corleonesi during the Second Mafia War (1981-1983).
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Uneasy alliance with the Corleonesi (Second Mafia War 1981-1983)

descriptions: A member of the Greco clan was part of the Corleonesi death squad.
edges.evidence_quote: Giuseppe Greco 'U Minnuni', the son of Salvatore 'The Senator' Greco and Leandro Greco's cousin, who had been one of the members of the Corleonesi death squad during the 1980s mafia war.

descriptions: The Grecos and Acquasanta clan were rivals in a conflict over the Palermo wholesale market rackets in the mid-1950s.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Acquasanta Mafia clan (Palermo wholesale market war in the mid 1950s)

descriptions: Joe Profaci, an American Mafia boss, helped mediate peace between the Greco factions.
edges.evidence_quote: Cottone ... still had good connections in the US, in particular with Joe Profaci, who came from the same village. At the time, Profaci was in Sicily and it seems he played an important role in the peace negotiations.

descriptions: The Grecos and the La Barbera brothers were rivals in the First Mafia War in the early 1960s.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: La Barbera brothers (First Mafia War in the early 1960s)

descriptions: The Greco clan sought mediation from the Villabate family boss Antonio Cottone to end their internal feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Piddu the lieutenant asked for mediation from Antonio Cottone, the boss of the Mafia family of Villabate

descriptions: The Inzerillo clan lists the Greco Mafia clan as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Greco Mafia clan

descriptions: The La Barberas went to war with the Grecos after a dispute over a drug shipment.
edges.evidence_quote: The La Barberas murdered Di Pisa and Manzella, triggering a war.

descriptions: The La Barbera family and the Greco clan were on opposite sides in the First Mafia War.
edges.evidence_quote: The conflict erupted over an underweight shipment of heroin... between clans allied with the Grecos... and clans allied with the La Barberas.

descriptions: The Grecos cooperated with the Sicilian Mafia in a drug shipment.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1962, mafia boss Cesare Manzella organized a drug shipment to the United States with the help of two Sicilian clans, the Grecos and the La Barberas.

Gas House Gang.description: The Gas House Gang was a New York City street gang founded in the 1890s, based in the Gas House district of Manhattan. They controlled the area along Third Avenue from 11th to 18th Street, specializing in armed robbery, extortion, and operating brothels. The gang committed an estimated 30 to 40 robberies per night and dominated the district for over two decades until being absorbed by the Five Points Gang in 1910.

descriptions: The Gas House Gang was absorbed by the Five Points Gang in 1910.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang continued to control the district for over two decades until it was eventually absorbed by the Five Points Gang in 1910.

descriptions: The Iron Cross gang patched over to become part of the Outlaws.
edges.evidence_quote: The Outlaws entered Georgia when the Iron Cross gang of Atlanta "patched over" on October 31, 1970

descriptions: Muià is a satellite cosca of Commisso.
edges.evidence_quote: operazione 'Canadian 'ndrangheta connection' nei confronti di 14 presunti esponenti ai Muià, cosca satellite dei Commisso

descriptions: Compton Varrio Tortilla Flats is a rival of Fruit Town Piru.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Compton Varrio Tortilla Flats

descriptions: Filthy 15 is a support club for Outlaws MC.
edges.evidence_quote: establishing a support club, the Filthy 15 MC

Bullshit Motorcycle Club.description: Danish outlaw motorcycle gang and organized criminal group active during the 1980s. Formed in 1979 in Tårnby, Amager from a merger of two clubs. Engaged in a violent turf war with the Hells Angels, known as the Copenhagen Biker War. Controlled much of Copenhagen's drug trade, including hashish in Freetown Christiania.

descriptions: Black Sheep MC is listed as a rival of Bullshit MC in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Hells Angels MC Morticians MC, Black Sheep MC, Galloping Goose MC (Denmark)

descriptions: Bullshit MC was formed by a merger of Filthy Few and Nøragersmindebanden.
edges.evidence_quote: Bullshit MC formed during the late 1970s in Tårnby, Amager as the result of a merger between the Filthy Few and Nøragersmindebanden

descriptions: Galloping Goose MC (Denmark) is listed as a rival of Bullshit MC in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Hells Angels MC Morticians MC, Black Sheep MC, Galloping Goose MC (Denmark)

descriptions: Bullshit MC fought a violent turf war against Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: They were best known for engaging in a violent turf war against the rivaling Hells Angels Motorcycle Club.

descriptions: Morticians MC is listed as a rival of Bullshit MC in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Hells Angels MC Morticians MC, Black Sheep MC, Galloping Goose MC (Denmark)

descriptions: Bullshit MC was formed by a merger of Filthy Few and Nøragersmindebanden.
edges.evidence_quote: Bullshit MC formed during the late 1970s in Tårnby, Amager as the result of a merger between the Filthy Few and Nøragersmindebanden

descriptions: Hells Angels and Bullshit MC fought a war in Copenhagen.
edges.evidence_quote: The two clubs would wage war against each other between September 1983 and December 1985.

descriptions: The PAC and Arshad Pappu gang are rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Arshad Pappu gang , MQM

descriptions: Loyalty Honour Silence is an affiliated organization of Manitoba Warriors.
edges.evidence_quote: Saskatchewan Warriors, Alberta Warriors, CENTRAL, Loyalty Honour Silence and MOB Squad are some of their more well known affiliations.

descriptions: Merciless Souls are affiliated with Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: In September 2008, a group of over fifty Outlaw and Pagan bikers prepared to confront members of the Merciless Souls Motorcycle Cub, a gang affiliated with the Hells Angels, at Virginia Motorsports Park in Dinwiddie.

descriptions: Outlaws prepared to confront Merciless Souls, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: In September 2008, a group of over fifty Outlaw and Pagan bikers prepared to confront members of the Merciless Souls Motorcycle Cub, a gang affiliated with the Hells Angels, at Virginia Motorsports Park in Dinwiddie.

descriptions: Brother Speed members attacked Empties members in May 2012.
edges.evidence_quote: In May 2012, five of the Idaho Falls members of Brother Speed, attacked two members of Pocatello's Empties motorcycle club at a gathering for a child who was suffering from cancer.

descriptions: Waray-Abuyog Gang has alliances with Sudoy-Sudoy Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: They have also been documented making alliances with other Waray gangs, most notably the Sudoy-Sudoy Gang.

descriptions: Izmailovskaya gang is listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Kuntsevskaya gang, Caucasian gangs, Izmailovskaya gang

Asian Boyz.description: The Asian Boyz are a street gang based in Southern California, founded in the late 1980s by Cambodian refugees to protect themselves from other gangs. The gang has 2,000 to 5,000 active members, primarily Southeast Asian, and is involved in drug trafficking, robbery, assault, and homicide. They are active in 28 cities across 14 U.S. states and have ties to the Crips.

descriptions: Asian Boyz and Asian Bloods engaged in a fight.
edges.evidence_quote: On August 12, 2006, a fight broke out between Asian Bloods and ABZ gang members at a house in Lowell, Massachusetts.

descriptions: Bloods are listed as a rival of Asian Boyz in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Bloods, East Side Longos, Smiley Dragon, Tiny Rascal Gang, Crazy Brother Clan, Vietnamese Boyz, Wah Ching, Fresno Bulldogs

descriptions: Crazy Brother Clan is listed as a rival of Asian Boyz in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Bloods, East Side Longos, Smiley Dragon, Tiny Rascal Gang, Crazy Brother Clan, Vietnamese Boyz, Wah Ching, Fresno Bulldogs

descriptions: Crips are listed as allies of Asian Boyz in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Crips, Menace of Destruction

descriptions: East Side Longos harassed Cambodian refugees who later founded Asian Boyz, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: The founders of Long Beach Asian Boyz were originally Cambodian refugees who the East Side Longos were harassing during the 1980s.

descriptions: Fresno Bulldogs is listed as a rival of Asian Boyz in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Bloods, East Side Longos, Smiley Dragon, Tiny Rascal Gang, Crazy Brother Clan, Vietnamese Boyz, Wah Ching, Fresno Bulldogs

descriptions: Menace of Destruction is listed as an ally of Asian Boyz in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Crips, Menace of Destruction

descriptions: Reccless Tigers are affiliated with West Side Asian Boyz, a faction of Asian Boyz.
edges.evidence_quote: The group is affiliated with the West Side Asian Boyz gang and high-ranking members have recently been arrested for murder.

descriptions: Smiley Dragon is listed as a rival of Asian Boyz in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Bloods, East Side Longos, Smiley Dragon, Tiny Rascal Gang, Crazy Brother Clan, Vietnamese Boyz, Wah Ching, Fresno Bulldogs

descriptions: Asian Boyz formed from a splinter of Tiny Rascal Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: In the late 1980s, an internal dispute happened within the Tiny Rascal Gang, and members left to form the Long Beach Asian Boyz.

descriptions: Vietnamese Boyz is listed as a rival of Asian Boyz in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Bloods, East Side Longos, Smiley Dragon, Tiny Rascal Gang, Crazy Brother Clan, Vietnamese Boyz, Wah Ching, Fresno Bulldogs

descriptions: Asian Boyz aligned with Vietnamese Boyz against Wah Ching.
edges.evidence_quote: the Asian Boyz (ABZ), who also aligned themselves with the Vietnamese Boyz (VBZ) in opposition to Wah Ching.

descriptions: Asian Boyz and Wah Ching are in a long conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Many members of the Asian Boyz have been in a long conflict with the Wah Ching gang.

descriptions: Big Circle Gang lists Asian Boyz as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: The Company, American Mafia, Red Wa, Fujian gangs, Wo Shing Wo, Menace of Destruction, Asian Boyz, MS-13, Netas

descriptions: Asian Boyz is listed as an ally of the Black Dragons in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Wah Ching , Vietnamese Boyz Gang, Oriental Lazy Boyz , Asian Boyz , Hop Sing Tong, United Bamboo Triad, 14k Triad

descriptions: Bloods and Asian Boyz are rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Crips, Aryan Brotherhood, Asian Boyz, Florencia 13, Folk Nation, Gangster Disciples, MS-13, Tiny Rascal Gang

descriptions: TRG and Asian Boyz have a prominent rivalry with murders.
edges.evidence_quote: The rivalry between TRG and Asian Boyz is quite prominent and has crossed interstate with murders on both sides.

descriptions: Asian Boyz splintered from TRG.
edges.evidence_quote: A group left the gang and became the Asian Boyz (ABZ).

descriptions: Wah Ching has an ongoing conflict with Asian Boyz.
edges.evidence_quote: The Wah Ching Gang has an ongoing conflict with another rival Asian gang in Los Angeles, the Asian Boyz (ABZ)

descriptions: The Altamura and Formicola clans fought a very violent conflict lasting years.
edges.evidence_quote: faida tra gli Altamura e i Formicola : conflitto violentissimo durato anni svoltosi nel territorio di San Giovanni a Teduccio

descriptions: The Aprea-Cuccaro clan was in a bloody feud with the Formicola clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Aprea-Cuccaro clan and Formicola clan : According to investigators, one of the bloodiest feuds in the eastern area of the city of Naples.

descriptions: The Antonio Giugliano clan established relationships with the Formicola clan for drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: le due organizzazioni avevano instaurato rapporti con i clan Batti di San Giuseppe Vesuviano e Formicola di San Giovanni a Teduccio e con la 'ndrangheta

descriptions: The Rosario Giugliano clan established relationships with the Formicola clan for drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: le due organizzazioni avevano instaurato rapporti con i clan Batti di San Giuseppe Vesuviano e Formicola di San Giovanni a Teduccio e con la 'ndrangheta

descriptions: The Formicola clan was once a satellite of the Mazzarella clan but is now allied with the Rinaldi clan and in conflict with the Mazzarella clan.
edges.evidence_quote: i Formicola e i Rinaldi, che all'epoca erano dei clan satelliti che facevano capo a loro, oggi invece i Formicola e i Rinaldi si sono ritagliati una fetta di spazio loro, ... i due clan si sono alleati e pertanto sono entrambi in contrasto con il clan Mazzarella

descriptions: The Cuccaro and Formicola clans were in a war with several bloody episodes.
edges.evidence_quote: faida tra i Cuccaro e i Formicola : guerra a cui sono riconducibili diversi episodi di sangue

descriptions: The Formicola and Rinaldi clans are allied with each other.
edges.evidence_quote: i due clan si sono alleati

Aava Gang.description: Sri Lankan motorcycle street gang active in the Northern Province, with around 60 members aged 18-25. Emerged after the end of the civil war, involved in drug trade, sexual violence, robberies, and attacks on police. Leader nicknamed 'Haava' (rabbit).

descriptions: Los Rusos are aligned with MZ/MF.
edges.evidence_quote: On 26 May 2025, members of "Los Rusos", aligned with the MZ/MF, entered the town of El Pozo, Sinaloa, previously controlled by Los Chapitos.

descriptions: Los Rusos (MZ/MF) entered Chapitos-controlled area, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: On 26 May 2025, members of "Los Rusos", aligned with the MZ/MF, entered the town of El Pozo, Sinaloa, previously controlled by Los Chapitos.

descriptions: Los Chapitos and Los Rusos dispute control of synthetic drugs.
edges.evidence_quote: Generating that both groups dispute the control of the production and sale of synthetic drugs in Culiacán

descriptions: Los Ninis is rival to Los Rusos.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: ... Los Rusos

descriptions: Los Rusos are aligned with La Mayiza and fight alongside them.
edges.evidence_quote: armed units aligned with the MZ/MF faction redeployed to Sinaloa to engage Los Chapitos. These included 'Los Rusos' from Baja California

descriptions: Los Rusos is a faction within Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: the cartel's sub-groups and allies are known to consist of ... Los Rusos (Zambada faction)
